content.formatted_body:
In reply to @jackworks:matrix.org
I read your recent comment, but I have no confidence I can convince others
https://github.com/tc39/proposal-extractors/issues/35#issuecomment-4974307713 bakkot is not convinced 😥

content.body: I didn't present my position very well there, to be honest. I skipped over too many of the steps I went through that led me to my position

It appears I will not be able to attend the majority of Plenary. ljharb would you be able to speak on my behalf? My intent is to block as I do not feel we've adequately discussed the cross-cutting concerns between our two proposals, so I'm not convinced this is necessarily the direction we should take in the language.

content.body: Due to a family emergency I need to travel this evening and will likely not be available the rest of the week.
I will also reach out to Devin Rousso to share my concerns and intent
